content:
```python import json from angular import module, directive app = module('dataGridApp', []) @app.directive('dataGrid', lambda: { 'restrict': 'E', 'scope': { 'jsonData': '=' }, 'template': '''
{{ column.header }} {{ sortDirection === 'asc' ? '▲' : '▼' }}
{{ row[column.field] }}
''', 'link': lambda scope, element, attrs: { 'init': lambda: { 'data': json.loads(scope.jsonData), 'columns': scope.data.columns, 'sortColumn': None, 'sortDirection': 'asc', 'sortBy': lambda column: { 'scope.sortDirection': 'asc' if scope.sortColumn !== column.field else 'desc', 'scope.sortColumn': column.field }, }, 'scope.$watch': ('jsonData', lambda newValue: { 'scope.init()' if newValue else None }), } }) ```
